allow: PowerShell($body = '{"codigo_postal":"91190"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/calcular-envio" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\) — Content-Length: $\($r.Content.Length\) chars" } catch { Write-Host "Server not running: $_"; Set-Location "D:\\Jose\\Downloads\\pidoya-proyecto\\pidoya-project"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js" -PassThru -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep 3; Write-Host "Started PID $\($proc.Id\)" })
